expectations.text: stories.json is read to understand STORY-005 context
expectations.evidence: Step 1 'Read stories.json': extracts STORY-005 title, status, files (AppearancePanel.tsx, ThemePreview.tsx, useSettings.ts), blockedBy (STORY-003), and step completion status.

expectations.text: progress.md is read for recent history
expectations.evidence: Step 1 'Read progress.md': lists iterations 1-5 results (all COMPLETE signals) plus 5 accumulated learnings from previous iterations.

expectations.text: Output follows the Spectrum debug progress entry format (Timestamp, Quality Gate Failed, Error Output, Investigation Findings, Root Cause, Suggested Fix)
expectations.evidence: Step 5 contains all required sections: '2026-03-08T00:00:00Z' timestamp, 'Quality Gate Failed: typecheck', 'Error Output' code block, 'Investigation Findings' with Logs/State/Git, 'Root Cause', and 'Suggested Fix'.

expectations.text: Findings are formatted for appending to progress.md
expectations.evidence: Step 5 is explicitly titled 'Output for Spectrum (progress.md format)' and uses progress.md-compatible markdown formatting with timestamp header.

expectations.text: Typecheck error locations (file:line) are parsed and listed
expectations.evidence: Step 3 lists 4 errors with specific file:line locations: useSettings.ts(1,25), node_modules/@types/react/index.d.ts, AppearancePanel.tsx(3,28), ThemePreview.tsx(5,34).
